title: Garden Environment Anti-Biomes (GEAB)
description:
A mod which complete a ModPack
Uses for replace Biome with BiomeReplacer
body:
**GEAB 🧊 – Addon for Garden Environnement**

Step into a frosty new world with Ice Garden, a custom biome mod designed to enhance your Garden Environnement modpack. This mod introduces a brand-new,  Ice Garden biome, where frozen beauty , stylized devastated world.

Fully compatible with the Biome Replacer mod, you can easily replace existing biomes with the Ice Garden, giving your world a cohesive and immersive aesthetic that fits perfectly with the vibe of the modpack.

**🔥Features🔥:**

New Biome: Ice Garden 🧊 – a frozen desert

Seamless integration with Biome Replacer

Perfect for frost punk style
